name: Neutral Characters
description: Appendix VIII: Neutral Characters (Core Rules pp.172-173). Profiles for NPCs found in starports, facilities, dive bars, etc. Used in special scenarios, GM play, and battlefield population.

rules.natural_6: NC requests to join crew permanently as PC (if they survive)
rules.battle_phase: If battle involves NCs and enemies, add a Neutral phase after the Slow phase
rules.reaction_score: Provided for characters joining crew temporarily or permanently

characters.name: Bystander
characters.description: Any random civilian who gets caught up in events.

characters.name: Street Punk
characters.description: Downtown tough nut itching for a chance to prove themselves.

characters.name: Corporate Slick
characters.description: If I play my cards right, I could be senior assistant to the VP within 3 years and then...

characters.name: Hardened Shopkeep
characters.description: You don't run a noodle shop in a Fringe Space starport without learning a few things.

characters.name: Hardened Colonist
characters.description: Hard-nosed survivors prone to getting eaten by alien lifeforms.

characters.name: Service Bot

conditional_savvy.condition: when performing a task it was built for

characters.description: Typical work bot, fitted with semi-autonomous AI emulation circuitry.
special_rules: Unarmed blows count as Damage +0 Melee

characters.name: Scientist
characters.description: Corporate or Unity research lab inhabitants. Usually not up to anything illegal.

characters.name: Technician
characters.description: Any starship-capable facility requires a small army of technical staff to keep everything working.

characters.name: Dock Worker
characters.description: Big, beefy worker given to militancy and unhealthy habits.
characters.weapon_conditional: No weapon if things are good, Colony Rifle if there's labor unrest

characters.name: Security Guard
characters.description: Typical rent-a-gun security for low-risk facilities.

characters.name: Enforcer
characters.description: The heavy hitters that deal with riots, dangerous criminals, and act as the front-line defense in case of invasion.
characters.weapon_split: Half with Shotguns, half with Handguns
